story.text:
**Vertex** V45 · **Signature** `101101` · **Stratum** 4 · Heavy

**Dimensions** 🛡️📜🔗💎 — Protection + Memory + Connection + Value

*Unnamed* — one of the open frontier, the **Quest of the Unnamed Faces**. This vertex has not yet been forged. Fork the repo, forge it at [spellweb.ai](https://spellweb.ai), and name what you find when you walk this configuration.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 45 = 18): [[Artefact 18 — Unnamed]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 46 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
